title: Trigger-Happy
body:
This mod is a small side project that adds a handful of vanilla-friendly 2D guns, drawing inspiration from the concept of 'Guns Without Roses' with its tiered guns and enchantments

It adds 6 guns to progress through, from iron to netherite. It also adds 3 ammo types and 4 enchantments. To make it more vanilla-friendly, only the highest tiered guns with max damage enchants can one-shot or two-shot the typical mobs (i.e. zombies, skeletons, etc.)

 

Also, you can rocket jump using explosive bullets (assuming you survive the explosion)

 

Guns

1. Iron Handgun

    Starter gun, 

    4 damage, 0.8s delay 

2. Golden Handgun

    Slightly better accuracy and fire rate
    
    4 damage, 0.6s delay

3. Diamond Sniper Rifle

    Heavy hitter, can two-shot zombies and one-shot spiders with max damage upgrades
    
    8 damage, 1.35x multiplier, 1.2s delay

4. Diamond Shotgun

    Meat shots, can one-shot zombies at close range with max damage upgrades
    
    0.5 damage, 5 pellets per shot, 1.2s delay

5. Diamond LMG

    Mow down hordes
    
    4 damage, 0.2s delay

6. Netherite Sniper Rifle

    Upgrade to the Diamond Sniper Rifle. Can one-shot zombies with max damage upgrades
    
    8 damage, 1.75x multiplier, 1s delay

 

Ammo

1. Iron Bullet - Basic ammo, 1.5 damage, 4 blocks/tick

2. High Velocity Bullet - Upgrade to Iron Bullets, 2.5 damage, 10 blocks/tick

3. Explosive Bullet  - Upgrade to Iron Bullets, 1.5 damage, 4 blocks/tick, explodes on impact

 

Enchantments

1. Lethal (1-5) - increases damage

2. Ammo Management (1-3) - +11% chance not to consume ammo per level

3. Force-A-Nature (1-2) - Higher knockback on hit

4. Quickdraw (1) - +25% faster firing rate
